articles.title: US attack on ship near Hormuz: Two Indian sailors dead, chief engineer still missing
articles.description: Two Indian sailors have died and a chief engineer is missing after a commercial vessel, MT Settebello, was attacked near the Strait of Hormuz. While 21 of the 24 Indian crew members were rescued, the incident raises serious concerns for seafarers in the volatile Gulf region. India has formally protested the attack, emphasizing the need to protect maritime workers.

articles.title: 10 bullets fired at Haryana gym owner during workout, chilling video surfaces
articles.description: A gym owner was fatally shot by assailants on a motorcycle in Hansi, Haryana, during an outdoor workout. Separately, a Delhi gym faced a similar shooting incident, with a social media post claiming responsibility from the Lawrence Bishnoi gang. Investigations are underway for both attacks, exploring motives like extortion and rivalry.

articles.title: The Siraj workload question: How India created cricket's busiest fast bowler
articles.description: Mohammed Siraj's withdrawal from the England and Ireland T20Is raised a curious question: how could a bowler who had drifted out of India's white-ball plans suddenly need rest? The answer lies in the format India have simply refused to play without him. While Jasprit Bumrah's workload was carefully managed, Siraj quietly became India's default fast bowler and the busiest quick in world cricket. For three years, he has been India's workhorse. Now, workload management has finally reached him too.
articles.full_text: Vineet Ramakrishnan is Editor - Sports at Times Internet and has spent over 15 years in digital media. Specialising in cricket and sports content strategy, he occasionally ventures into number-driven storytelling. articles.title: Trump asked if he is concerned about latest inflation numbers. His answer: 'I love it'
articles.description: President Trump expressed an unexpectedly positive view on recent inflation data, "loving" the rise in consumer prices despite it being the fastest annual pace in over three years. He attributed the increase primarily to energy costs linked to the Iran conflict, claiming his administration's actions would stabilize oil markets and ease inflationary pressures.

articles.title: "Ruined his face": Looksmaxxing streamer Clavicular brutally roasted after unrecognizable surgery reveal
articles.description: Looksmaxxing influencer Clavicular is facing heavy backlash after revealing the results of his rhinoplasty online. Before-and-after photos of the surgery quickly went viral, with many fans claiming he “ruined his face” and lost the distinct look that made him famous. Others defended the transformation, arguing the results may still be affected by swelling. The controversy has also reignited criticism surrounding the extreme beauty standards and risky lifestyle promoted within the online looksmaxxing community.

articles.title: "Erica was described as an emotional asset": Candace Owens keeps pressure on officials over controversial Erika Kirk email
articles.description: Candace Owens says she is intensifying her FOIA fight over a controversial White House Correspondents’ Dinner email that allegedly described Erika Kirk as an “emotional asset” shortly after a shooting incident. Owens claimed government departments initially rejected her request as too broad, prompting her team to submit a narrower version with specific names and dates. She also accused Andrew Colvett and others of misleading the public, insisting the leaked email is authentic and will eventually be verified.

articles.title: What really happened to Reckless Ben’s GoFundMe amid the missing LEGO collection controversy?
articles.description: The Bricks & Minifigs and Reckless Ben dispute began with claims that a $200,000 Star Wars LEGO collection was never returned to the Mansell family. The controversy later expanded into arrests, public accusations, lawsuits, store closures, and a major fundraising campaign. The latest development saw the Mansell GoFundMe page restored, while the legal battle continues ahead of a scheduled June 30 hearing.

articles.title: ITR filing FY 2025-26: What is Form 26AS & what if it has errors? Things taxpayers should do to avoid getting a tax notice
articles.description: First, let’s understand what Form 26AS is – it’s essentially a tax statement that is linked to the taxpayer’s PAN. It shows details of tax dedicated at source and tax collected at source. It’s a key document that is essential for taxpayers when filing their income tax return.

articles.title: India slashes excise duty on ethanol-blended petrol: Key details
articles.description: India has waived excise duty on blended petrol containing 22-30% ethanol as part of a push to increase ethanol usage. This move coincides with rising fuel prices due to the Middle East crisis, prompting plans for discounted E85 fuel and continued availability of E20 petrol nationwide.

articles.title: ODI tickets worth Rs 52.36 lakh went unsold: Khanna
articles.description: "Tickets worth Rupees 52,36,000 were unsold. Why all the tickets were not sold-out? DDCA started online ticket sale quite late that too without proper advertisement," Khanna claimed in a media release.

articles.title: 'Saying goodbye to our colleagues': Opendoor shuts India operations, hundreds lose jobs
articles.description: American digital real estate firm Opendoor is ceasing its India operations, impacting its nearly 250 employees in the country. CEO Kaz Nejatian confirmed the move, stating it's part of a strategic shift to bring roles closer to American customers under the new Opendoor 2.0 model. This decision, driven by technological advancements and streamlining, is not a reflection of employee performance

This decision, driven by technological advancements and streamlining, is not a reflection of employee performance

articles.title: How Vibhav Altekar went from just an engineer to powering a landmark US military rescue
articles.description: Indian-American engineer Vibhav Altekar is in the spotlight after a drone boat developed by his company, Saronic Technologies, helped carry out a first-of-its-kind US military rescue mission near the Strait of Hormuz. Here's a look at how the UC Davis graduate built a career in AI, autonomous systems and maritime technology before co-founding the defence tech company

articles.title: Days after exposing CBSE portal flaws, 19-year-old Nisarg Adhikary lands role at IIT Kanpur
articles.description: Nineteen-year-old ethical hacker Nisarga Adhikary, who recently highlighted security vulnerabilities in CBSE's digital systems, has been appointed as an OSINT and Threat Intelligence Engineer at IIT Kanpur's C3iHub. Adhikary's role will focus on identifying and analyzing cyber threats using publicly available information, following his public allegations about CBSE's data accessibility.

articles.title: HPRCA JBT Admit Card 2026 Released: Check direct link to download
articles.description: Himachal Pradesh Rajya Chayan Aayog has released e-admit cards for the Junior Basic Teacher (JBT) recruitment examination (Post Code 26015). Candidates can download their hall tickets from the official portal until June 17, 2026. The written exam is scheduled for June 13, 14, 16, and 17, 2026. Arrive early, as gates close 30 minutes prior to the test

articles.title: Bharathiraja's mortal remains reach Theni - VIDEO
articles.description: Legendary filmmaker Bharathiraja's mortal remains reached his hometown Theni for final rites, drawing tributes from family, friends, and industry figures like Mohanlal and Pawan Kalyan. Known for his unique portrayal of rural life, his passing marks a significant loss to Indian cinema. The veteran director's legacy will continue to inspire.

articles.title: Simu Liu comes to Hudson Williams defence
articles.description: Actor Hudson Williams found himself at the center of controversy after an old photograph resurfaced, depicting a swastika drawn on his face during a camp experience. Co-star Simu Liu came to his defense, emphasizing the ongoing discrimination against people of color in the industry and criticizing the media's sensationalist approach.

articles.title: Mohanlal and 'Thudarum' team remember Bharathiraja
articles.description: Renowned filmmaker Bharathiraja has passed away at 84. Celebrated for his realistic portrayal of rural life and emotions, he also acted in the Malayalam film 'Thudarum'. Actor Mohanlal fondly recalled working with Bharathiraja, calling it an honour. Director Tharun Moorthy also shared poignant memories. Bharathiraja's impactful legacy continues to inspire.

articles.title: 'Karuppu' BO day 27: Suriya's film falls 4.4 percent
articles.description: Suriya and Trisha's 'Karuppu' continues its strong theatrical run, nearing Rs 200 crore in India after 27 days. The fantasy action film has garnered over Rs 306 crore worldwide, with a stable 15.91% occupancy in its fourth week. 'Karuppu' is set for its OTT premiere on Prime Video on June 12.
